patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (patient ID 104), has documented dyslipidemia and hypertension with multiple lipid panels and a diagnosis of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major recent procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy scheduled/performed 02/21/2025 (Haroon M, MD). Notable labs: 07/03/2023 ferritin 266.8 (H), iron 41 (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L), triglycerides 158 (H), LDL 62, HDL 54. Prior BMP (01/11/2021) showed glucose 199 (H) and creatinine 1.1 (H). Current medication activity includes an atorvastatin refill request. Functional assessments note difficulty walking/stairs and mixed reports about difficulty dressing/errands across encounters. Multiple care teams documented including Hand HA, MD (Singing River) and several Piedmont providers. Conflicting demographic entries (DOB and legal sex) are present in the source records and should be reconciled administratively.
